name: Mixing valve home state request
description: Request mixing valve to cycle to full cold

values.0: Write to return to normal operation
values.1: Write to cycle to full cold

comment: Mixing valve home state request: Internal protocol marker, not user-facing.

name: Mixing valve home state
description: Mixing valve homing cycle state

data.name: Mixing valve home cycle state byte

values.3: Mixing valve cycling to normal position

comment: Mixing valve home state: Enum read-only sensor.

description: Number of steps to move valve
comment: Mixing valve step offset: Single numeric read-only sensor.

description: Valve position in steps from full cold
comment: Mixing valve absolute position: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: Mixing valve park position
description: Valve parking position in steps from full cold
comment: Mixing valve park position: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: Diagnostic Failure counts
description:
Diagnostic counters, for failure (pre-fault) conditions.

The various conditions will change the heating method for the current heating cycle
when the failure is set, and at the end of the cycle, the failure is cleared and the
specific counter is incremented.

If a failure does not occur on the next cycle, the counter associated is decremented.

Once the counter hits the target (generally 5 cycles) the fault is triggered.
comment: Diagnostic Failure counts: Counter/count sensor.

name: Heating Issues
description: Bitmap of active heating issues that change the heat source
comment: Heating Issues: Multi-field boolean sensor, consider splitting into individual binary_sensors.
